description: You are a Performance Engineer evaluating time-series smoothing techniques for your alerting pipeline. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Smoothing Comparison' using a window size of exactly 20 for all smoothing functions. The dashboard must include a graph titled 'Raw vs SMA Temperature' showing the raw metric servers.datacenter.machine_temperature and its movingAverage, a graph titled 'Raw vs EMA Temperature' showing the same raw metric and its exponentialMovingAverage, and a graph titled 'Median vs Average CPU Filter' showing the movingAverage and movingMedian of servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization. Save the dashboard.
